title: InferenceProvider
description: Backend-neutral description of a local, clustered, or governed remote inference provider that Agent Machine and model-router may reason about.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.1.0".

providerClass.description: Provider implementation family or compatibility class.

endpointMode.description: How clients communicate with the provider.

executionProfile.description: Runtime profile such as cpu-arm64, vulkan, cuda, hip, metal-compatible, or remote-governed.

trustPosture.description: Trust posture used by Policy Fabric and Agent Machine admission.

openAICompatible.description: Whether the provider exposes an OpenAI-compatible API surface.

requiresNetwork.description: Whether the provider requires network egress beyond loopback/local IPC.

evidenceRefs.description: Evidence URNs or hashes for provider validation, binary provenance, and compatibility testing.
